workflow_tiles.title: Customer Signal
workflow_tiles.primary_text: Performance is the strongest positive customer signal.
workflow_tiles.secondary_text: The clearest positive theme from selected product reviews.

workflow_tiles.title: Risk Signal
workflow_tiles.primary_text: Heating is the clearest customer risk area to validate.
workflow_tiles.secondary_text: The issue most worth validating with more evidence.

workflow_tiles.title: Evidence Volume
workflow_tiles.secondary_text: Treat as directional until review volume improves.

workflow_tiles.title: Benchmark Mode
workflow_tiles.secondary_text: Add competitor only when benchmark comparison is needed.

workflow_tiles.title: Market Context
workflow_tiles.secondary_text: Use as external context, not as a replacement for review evidence.

kpi_cards.label: Review Volume

kpi_cards.label: User Rating
kpi_cards.helper_text: Average marketplace rating for the selected product.

kpi_cards.label: Input Quality
kpi_cards.helper_text: Signal quality of imported review text.

kpi_cards.label: Sentiment Direction
kpi_cards.helper_text: Directional aggregate sentiment, not a final product score.

sentiment_distribution_chart.title: Customer Sentiment Mix
sentiment_distribution_chart.description: Overall split of positive, negative, and neutral aspect signals.

top_aspect_chart.title: Aspect Discussion Volume
top_aspect_chart.description: Ranks the smartphone aspects users mention most often.

aspect_sentiment_chart.title: Aspect Sentiment by Topic
aspect_sentiment_chart.description: Shows which product aspects are positive-heavy, negative-heavy, mixed, or thin evidence.

data.interpretation: Performance is a high-volume positive driver and likely a product strength.
Battery has a small positive signal with only 1 mention(s).
Camera has a small positive signal with only 1 mention(s).
Display has a small positive signal with only 1 mention(s).
Heating has negative sentiment, but only 1 mention(s). Keep it on the watchlist.

sentiment_priority_matrix.title: Sentiment Priority Matrix
sentiment_priority_matrix.description: Classifies aspect signals by mention volume and sentiment direction.

competitor_gap_chart.title: No Competitor Selected
competitor_gap_chart.description: This is currently a product-only analysis. Select a competitor only when benchmark comparison is needed.

news_signal_chart.title: Trusted Market Signals
news_signal_chart.description: Shows technology, company, and region signals from trusted market sources.

source_tier_chart.title: Source Trust Mix
source_tier_chart.description: Shows the trust-tier mix of market/news evidence used for context.

quality_cards.label: Readiness
quality_cards.helper_text: Whether the current workspace is safe to interpret.

quality_cards.label: Warnings
quality_cards.helper_text: Some products have fewer than 30 reviews. Treat sentiment, benchmark, and forecast outputs as directional.

quality_cards.label: Confidence
quality_cards.helper_text: Low review volume. Validate before decisions.

recommended_actions: Increase the real review sample before using these findings for roadmap or leadership decisions.
Validate the top risk signal with more reviews, evidence examples, and product-team review.
Keep this as a product-only analysis, or add a competitor only when benchmark comparison is required.
Preserve evidence links with every claim so the report remains auditable.
Expand trusted source ingestion or lower the relevance threshold if coverage is unexpectedly empty.
